creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks good!  Compilation has some warnings you might want to address:

--- main.o ---
main.c:314:2: warning: implicit declaration of function 'openpty' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        openpty(&master, &slave, NULL, NULL, &ws);
        ^
main.c:315:2: warning: implicit declaration of function 'login_tty' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        login_tty(slave);
        ^
2 warnings generated.

Please let me know if you want the patch to be committed as is or else submit a new patch fixing this issue.
